suppliers.name: Supplier Alpha
suppliers.notes: Sole source — lead time extended from 14D to 28D. Quality issues reported in last 2 shipments.

suppliers.name: Supplier Beta
suppliers.notes: On-time delivery declining. One alternate available (Supplier Gamma — 3-week lead time).

suppliers.name: Supplier Gamma
suppliers.notes: Lead time variance high. 2 alternates available. Monitor closely.

suppliers.name: Supplier Delta
suppliers.notes: Performing well. Strong on-time record. Multiple alternates available.
